title: Alliance Global Keeps a Neutral Rating on Canopy Growth Corporation (CGC)
sentences: Alliance Global Keeps a Neutral Rating on Canopy Growth Corporation (CGC) Alliance Global has maintained a Neutral rating on Canopy Growth Corporation (CGC) but reduced its price objective from C$2.50 to C$1.80 after the company's fiscal third-quarter report.
Canopy Growth reported a loss of C$0.18 per share, an improvement from the previous year, with revenue increasing to C$90.39 million.
The company noted stronger fundamentals, particularly in Canada, and is focused on improving execution and the upcoming acquisition of MTL Cannabis.
